day1_night_start.name: Me
day1_night_start.text: *Back home. I lie down on the bed and the whole day flashes through my mind.*

day1_night_2.name: Me
day1_night_2.text: *New school, new people. Everyone was nice. Seems like a good school.*

day1_night_3.name: Me
day1_night_3.text: *I think I can settle in just fine.*

day1_night_phone.name: Me
day1_night_phone.text: *I check my phone. Messages from friends at my old school... none.*

day1_night_phone_2.name: Me
day1_night_phone_2.text: *Well, they're probably busy. I should reach out first sometime.*

day1_night_sleep.name: Me
day1_night_sleep.text: *I pull the covers up. Wonder what tomorrow will be like.*

day1_night_sleep_2.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_2.text: *...Right before I fall asleep, I thought I saw something flash outside the window. ...Probably just a dream.*
